parsed.name: driver-compare-select-pk
parsed.description: Point SELECT by primary key — pycubrid (Pure Python) vs CUBRIDdb (C extension). Same CUBRID 11.2 server, same CAS protocol, isolates driver implementation.

queries:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS bench_select
CREATE TABLE bench_select (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  amount INT NOT NULL
)
INSERT INTO bench_select
SELECT ROWNUM, 'user_' || CAST(ROWNUM AS VARCHAR), MOD(ROWNUM, 10000)
FROM db_class
LIMIT 10000

steps.name: select-by-pk
steps.query: SELECT id, name, amount FROM bench_select WHERE id = %(id)s
